value.0: Feryl Dragonhunter was a monster of a man who, with four kills to his credit, thought he had perfected the art of dragon slaying. He aided his efforts by creating magical equipment from his previous victories, including several different boots he mockingly called his Dragon Slippers. Amazingly, Feryl was not defeated by his preferred enemy, but was surprised by a small band of goblins on his way to a hunt.
Forged Boots of the Orc General

Feryl Dragonhunter was a monster of a man who, with four kills to his credit, thought he had perfected the art of dragon slaying. He aided his efforts by creating magical equipment from his previous victories, including several different boots he mockingly called his Dragon Slippers. Amazingly, Feryl was not defeated by his preferred enemy, but was surprised by a small band of goblins on his way to a hunt.

Fashioned from rough iron, these bars extend into a narrow slot in the floor.

I am not here, you can't see me...
I am an emitter, a semi-invisble object that is maintaining the special effects you see in my vicinity. The Dungeon Master has decreed that he needs my assistance in forwarding his quest by projecting a variety of special effects in the area.

You cannot harm me, and the only way to remove me is via the DM Helper Rod, once the quest is over I request that I am removed to save server processing time, if I am here but there is no quest in progress, please notify the DM so he may remove me
